item.title: McQuaidNFL: Michael McQuaid @McQuaidNFL · 6min Final call for NFL fans to make a pick on @Jeff_Reinebold ’s PEOPLES DRAFT. We need
item.description:
Michael McQuaid @McQuaidNFL · 6min Final call for NFL fans to make a pick on @Jeff_Reinebold ’s PEOPLES DRAFT. We need fans from the following teams:
Browns Giants Panthers Bears Bills Patriots
Open worldwide. A text pick and then a video pre recorded! 1 2 318
